interpretation: Sign-randomisation null (preserves |r| but flips signs uniformly): p=0.000000 for Sharpe, p=0.000000 for cumulative log-return — observed Sharpe is in the extreme right tail of the no-skill distribution. The block-shuffle null with replacement (Sharpe centre near 0.1624, p=0.5075) is *not* a no-skill null because resampling-with-replacement of an already-skilful series preserves the mean/sd; report only as a sanity check.
